case_title: CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED VS. KENNETH LARREW et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARREW, KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150 NINTH STREET, #319, S.F. CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LARREW, KENNETH DOES 1 TO 5

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LARREW, KENNETH
